description.unified: Deals of Attack Power damage to enemies within range and stuns them for [2 sec->3 sec].

Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for 15 sec, dealing continuous Magic Damage. Enemies with [Mark of Death] take [(added) 25% increased Magic Damage], and if recast within 15 sec, the [Magic Defense reduction is increased by 50% -> effect is increased by 20%]. This effect stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled [(removed) and reducing Magic Defense by 10%].

Deals of Attack Power Magic Damage per second to all enemies for [14 sec->12 sec], recovers HP equal to [75%->130%] of damage dealt, and has a [(added) 10% chance to stun them for 0.6 sec]. During the duration, all allies take [10%->20%] reduced Physical Damage, and enemies with [Mark of Death] take additional Magic Damage equal to 97.6% of Attack Power.

Increases all allies’ Physical Defense by [55->45](1+0.3Skill Level). When taking damage that would be fatal, enters [Coffin] state for 5 sec, restoring of Attack Power + [10%->6%] of Max HP. While in [Coffin] state, Attack Speed changes do not affect you, you are immune to all damage, and deal Magic Damage equal to 5% of Max HP per second to nearby enemies.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [2000->1000], but pulls the target to your vicinity with a [(added) 100%] success rate.
Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but cooldown is reduced by [(added) 7 sec] [(removed) All allies additionally take 10% less Physical DMG].
When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for [1 sec->1.2 sec].

description.unified: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target’s CC Resist by [320->400] and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.

dark.unified: On hit, Attack and Healing are increased by 1%. This effect stacks up to [35->50] times.

description.unified: Deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power per second to nearby enemies, reduces their Attack by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to [100%->75%] of damage dealt. The 4 allies with the highest Attack (excluding yourself) deal [{2}% increased damage to non-hero enemies]. This effect cannot be dispelled.
